variants: Sumaila Hakimi is a professional who holds the Vigilant Lightkeeper Title, underscoring her commitment to safety in her work. She graduated from Frostpine College of Design, where she honed her design skills. In addition to her professional accomplishments, Sumaila serves as the Garden Program Coordinator Spruce Spring, actively promoting sustainable gardening practices in her community. Her familiarity with Icelandic declensions allows her to engage with a broader audience in her initiatives. Furthermore, she has contributed her ideas to readers through a publication in Fractured Atlas Press.
